incidents.title: Guangdong industrial power curtailment disrupts stepper motor and electronics output
incidents.summary: Regional load-shedding has reduced motor winding, electronics final test, harness, and extrusion operations in Guangdong. LDO/Moons-class stepper supply is the primary modeled shortage.

incidents.title: Taichung linear rail coating line slowdown
incidents.summary: A coating-line maintenance issue constrains Hiwin/LDO rail output. A conditional US distributor path exists, so downstream proposals should remain reviewable.

incidents.title: Shanghai toolhead assembly cell quarantine
incidents.summary: A cell-level quarantine interrupts direct Stealthburner toolhead assembly output for one week.

incidents.title: UK hotend dispatch backlog cleared
incidents.summary: A small carrier backlog affected Revo Voron dispatches and has been cleared.
